title: Naha, Okinawa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Naha, Okinawa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Naha is a city in Okinawa with a population of 320,000. The tropical capital of Okinawa with unique Ryukyu culture, stunning beaches, and a year-round subtropical climate.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
